commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared `SourceDeliveryPlan`/`SourceDeliveryOutcome` helper and rewires isolated cron delivery planning, execution, dispatch, and focused tests to use it.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main treats a matched message-tool send as delivered, while the PR's mode-none plan cannot mark the same send as satisfying delivery; I did not run a live cron job.
commands.review_followup: Missing real behavior proof is a contributor/maintainer merge gate, and the branch has a blocking delivery-state regression to resolve before merge.

target.title: refactor(cron): centralize source delivery plan
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a shared internal `SourceDeliveryPlan` / `SourceDeliveryOutcome` for visible source delivery ownership, message-tool target verification, fallback satisfaction, and legacy runner projection.
- Migrate isolated cron announce delivery to carry the plan through prepare/execute/finalize, and make dispatch consume the outcome instead of cron-specific `skipMessagingToolDelivery` / `unverifiedMessagingToolDelivery` booleans.
- Move message-tool target matching out of cron delivery dispatch, remove the old cron target synthesis helper, and derive trace/fallback/delivered state from the shared outcome.

## Verification
Behavior addressed: Internal refactor only; cron announce delivery keeps the landed message-tool-only behavior while deleting cron-local delivery-suppression booleans and target matching.
Real environment tested: Local source checkout on macOS with focused source/type/lint/test gates.
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm format:check src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.ts src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-delivery.runtime.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.test-harness.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.named-agent.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/clawdbot4-source-delivery-plan.tsbuildinfo --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.ts src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-delivery.runtime.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.test-harness.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.named-agent.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.named-agent.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --output /tmp/clawdbot4-source-delivery-plan-autoreview.txt`
Evidence after fix: Source-delivery plan tests cover target normalization, verified vs unverified message-tool outcomes, and plan projection; cron tests assert the dispatch outcome object, fallback satisfaction, unresolved-target handling, and direct dispatch behavior.
Observed result after fix: Format, lint, tsgo, focused Vitest, and autoreview are clean; focused Vitest reported 4 files and 111 tests passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
What was not tested: No live Discord/cron run; no public API, config, or protocol surface changed.
